Describe the issue in detail and what you expected to happen.

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'

## 🧪 Environment

| Detail             | Value                                  |
|--------------------|----------------------------------------|
| Operating System   | Windows / macOS / Linux / Other        |
| OS Version         | e.g. Windows 11 Pro, macOS Sonoma 14.4 |
| Architecture       | x64 / ARM / x86                        |
| Platform Type      | Desktop / Server / Mobile / VM         |
| Shell / Terminal   | PowerShell / Bash / Zsh / CMD          |
| Virtualization     | Native / Docker / WSL / VM / None      |

Paste relevant error messages or upload screenshots if needed.
